title: Saudi-Style Falafel Bowl
description: A flavorful and nutritious bowl filled with crispy falafel, topped with malty rice and a drizzle of cozy tahini sauce.
instructions: 1. Rinse the chickpeas and soak them in water for at least 8 hours.
2. Drain and rinse the chickpeas again, then blend them with falafel mix until smooth.
3. Using your hands, shape the mixture into small patties.
4. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
5. Add the falafel patties and cook until crispy and golden brown, about 4-5 minutes per side.
6. Meanwhile, cook the malty rice according to package instructions.
7. Warm the cozy tahini sauce by whisking it with a fork.
8. Assemble the bowls by placing a scoop of rice, a few falafel patties, and a drizzle of tahini sauce.
